articles.author: Anniek Bao, Evelyn Cheng
articles.title: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners - CNBC
articles.description: An historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.
articles.content:
PARIS, FRANCE - JUNE 24: Pedestrians use umbrellas to shield from the sun as record-breaking high temperatures continue in Paris on June 24, 2026 in Paris, France. 
Europe wants to narrow its record… [+6537 chars]
